pi_items.source: setup_task.sh defines the briefing with HTTP/HTTPS proxy 10.200.5.99:8080, and export_result.sh explicitly greps for this directive.
setup_task.sh dynamically creates Network_Briefing.md instructing the user to save the backup to this exact path.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated Network Briefing document created dynamically by setup_task.sh. It explicitly instructs the user to configure an HTTP/HTTPS proxy at 10.200.5.99:8080 (which translates to the torrc directive 'HTTPSProxy 10.200.5.99:8080') and to save a backup of the torrc configuration to '/home/ga/Documents/torrc_backup.txt'.
